meaning: Motion Picture Association of America 美国电影协会
examples: MPAA sues popular BitTorrent search engines.
The MPAA is the only organization unwilling to cooperate with us.
Torrentspy was the first torrent site that took action against the MPAA.
Studios and the MPAA are working to resolve the issue without involving the U.S. government.
The MPAA puts a brave face on the battle to stave off theft of studio content.
